underlying_goal: Review multiple GitHub PRs for code quality, correctness, and suggestions using an automated code review workflow
friction_detail: The review-pr skill plugin had intermittent 'Unknown skill' errors requiring reloads, and one review was interrupted by the user.
brief_summary: User requested code reviews on ~10 PRs across a Rails/React codebase and received thorough, domain-aware reviews for each, with minor plugin loading friction.
